bns:Component.name: HROpsConsole - Get Notifications
bns:Component.bns:description: Returns system notifications and alerts for HR Ops Console header bell

message.msgTxt: '{"unreadCount":4,"notifications":[{"id":"N001","title":"CRITICAL: Payroll Exception - Terminated Employee","msg":"Omar Hassan (E015) is still active in ADP Payroll post-termination.","time":"10 min ago","read":false,"severity":"critical","caseId":"C-2024-005"},{"id":"N002","title":"SLA Warning: C-2024-003 Due in 9 days","msg":"Pay discrepancy grievance for Jordan Williams approaching SLA deadline.","time":"1 hr ago","read":false,"severity":"high","caseId":"C-2024-003"},{"id":"N003","title":"COBRA Deadline: E015 - 44 days remaining","msg":"COBRA election notice must be sent within 44 days of Feb 28 termination.","time":"2 hrs ago","read":false,"severity":"high","employeeId":"E015"},{"id":"N004","title":"Manager Action Overdue: Mike Torres","msg":"Written statement for C-2024-001 was due March 5.","time":"3 hrs ago","read":false,"severity":"medium","caseId":"C-2024-001"},{"id":"N005","title":"Integration Sync Warning: ADP Payroll","msg":"4 errors detected in last ADP sync. 4 employees impacted.","time":"5 hrs ago","read":true,"severity":"medium","integrationId":"INT-02"}]}'
